ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., randomized controlled trial, observational study) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name or ID of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "intervention" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "control" TEXT /* Description of the control */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "trial_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "trial_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trial */,
  "trial_objectives" TEXT /* Primary and secondary objectives of the trial */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., intervention, control) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, occurred, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_events_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the participant is enrolled in */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled */,
  "participant_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "participant_age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "participant_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, dropped out, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "RCTs" (
  "RCT_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RCT */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the RCT belongs to */,
  "RCT_name" TEXT /* Name of the RCT */,
  "interventionEvent" INTEGER /* Number of events in the intervention group */,
  "interventionTotal" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the intervention group */,
  "controlEvent" INTEGER /* Number of events in the control group */,
  "controlTotal" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the control group */,
  "randomization_method" TEXT /* Method used for randomization */,
  "blinding" TEXT /* Blinding status (e.g., single-blind, double-blind) */,
  "RCT_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the RCT */,
  "RCT_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the RCT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("RCT_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_RCTs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_types" (
  "study_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study type */,
  "study_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the study type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study type */,
  "study_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each study type */,
  "study_type_reference" TEXT /* Reference link or documentation for the study type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "event_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each event type */,
  "event_type_reference" TEXT /* Reference link or documentation for the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Value of the outcome (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_outcomes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the audit entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
